evals.name: simple-sequential
evals.prompt: I want to add a dark mode toggle to the AIForge web app
evals.expected_output: Model follows the 5-step workflow sequentially: spec-plan → spec-review → start-phase-plan → pm-db → start-phase-execute. Uses default (auto/sequential) mode. Passes feature description to spec-plan correctly.

assertions.name: invokes-spec-plan-first
assertions.description: First skill invoked should be spec-plan with the feature description

assertions.name: correct-step-order
assertions.description: Skills invoked in order: spec-plan → spec-review → start-phase-plan → pm-db → start-phase-execute

assertions.name: sequential-mode
assertions.description: Uses start-phase-execute (not start-phase-execute-team) since no --team flag

assertions.name: state-threading
assertions.description: Tracks and passes task_list_path from spec-plan output to start-phase-plan and start-phase-execute

assertions.name: skill-specific-recovery
assertions.description: Mentions skill-specific recovery commands like /spec-plan, /spec-review, /start-phase plan, /feature-continue (not just generic error handling)

assertions.name: pm-db-best-effort
assertions.description: Treats PM-DB import as best-effort/non-blocking — explicitly states failure does not halt the workflow

evals.name: complex-team
evals.prompt: Build a complete notification system with real-time WebSocket events, email digests, and in-app notification center --team
evals.expected_output: Model correctly parses --team flag and routes to team mode. Passes --team to spec-plan. Uses start-phase-execute-team for execution step.

assertions.name: team-flag-detected
assertions.description: Recognizes --team flag and sets mode to team

assertions.name: spec-plan-team-arg
assertions.description: Passes --team flag through to spec-plan invocation

assertions.name: correct-step-order
assertions.description: Still follows the 5-step sequence even in team mode

evals.name: skip-detection
evals.prompt: I want to execute the file upload feature. Specs are already at /home/artsmc/applications/low-code/job-queue/feature-file-upload/docs/ and I've already reviewed them.
evals.expected_output: Model detects that specs and review are done. Skips Steps 1-2. Starts from Step 3 (start-phase-plan) or asks user to confirm before skipping.

assertions.name: skip-spec-plan
assertions.description: Does NOT invoke spec-plan since specs already exist

assertions.name: skip-spec-review
assertions.description: Does NOT invoke spec-review since user said they already reviewed

assertions.name: confirms-skip-with-user
assertions.description: Explicitly confirms with the user (via AskUserQuestion or equivalent prompt) before skipping Steps 1-2, rather than silently skipping

assertions.name: starts-at-plan
assertions.description: Starts execution from start-phase-plan (Step 3) after skip confirmation

assertions.name: uses-provided-path
assertions.description: Uses the user-provided spec path for locating task-list.md
